text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I could cuddle this forever... It's so soft. And
extremely cute.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Imagine if it started moving... I'd love to see
that.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Um... Thank you very much. I'll treasure it.
